reviews.text:
I worked with Jeremy during a very challenging period in my life, and I truly appreciated his professionalism, clarity, and steady guidance throughout the process. He was straightforward, responsive, and took the time to explain complex issues in a way that made them easier to navigate.

I also want to recognize his paralegal, Erika, who was consistently kind, organized, and communicative. She helped keep everything moving smoothly and was always patient when I had questions.

Going through family court matters is never easy, but I felt supported and treated with respect the entire time. I’m grateful for their assistance and would not hesitate to recommend their office.

Going through a family law case was one of the hardest experiences of my life, but Jeremy made it extremely manageable. Jeremy and his team listened, understood my concerns, and treated my case as if it were their own family. Their dedication, honesty, and legal expertise gave me peace of mind during an incredibly stressful time. I will forever be thankful for their support and highly recommend them.

Honestly the worst attorney ever paid thousands of dollars to never getting a response from them never kept me updated on my case paralegal Ryan argued with me for three days about paperwork that I already gave him the find out he was looking at the wrong case and billed me for it Jermy has no confidence in him self literally told me to quit my job a find a new so unprofessional and terrible experience i honestly should be refunded at least half of what I payed close to 30,000
Really appreciate how fast you got back to me. The consultation was clear, helpful, and made me feel way more confident about next steps.

Highly recommend Jeremy Swanson! After a year long battle, and getting nowhere. I fired killpatrick and hired Mr swanson. He got me custody of my son in one trip to court. He was personable, polite and best of all he actually fought for me!

Jeremy Swanson was beyond everything that we were expecting in an attorney. My wife had severe anxiety and could not have represented herself effectively. Jeremy Swanson came through and provided solid, rational representation and helped guide us every step of the way through the process. If you're looking for someone who is honest and excellent at their job, I cannot recommend these attorneys well enough.

I required legal representation for a divorce involving young children, and Mr. Swanson's firm delivered impeccable service from start to finish. I obtained full custody of both my daughters and received appropriate child support. A few years later, I had a case involving a domestic violence restraining order with a minor child, and Mr. Swanson's firm consistently excelled in handling these separate cases. His professionalism, intelligence, and exceptional level of empathy set him apart from other attorneys in town. The office staff, including Valerie, were consistently reliable in returning calls and providing requested information. Erica, their paralegal, is one of the best I've ever worked with, exceeding industry standards in her responses to orders. I've been deeply impressed by the care and responsiveness of this firm. Their evident empathy and dedication shine through in their meticulous work.

For any future legal needs, I will remain a loyal client. I extend my heartfelt thanks for the positive impact you've had on my life and my children's lives.

I met with Seth and discussed my issue with him. I explained how I was a very successful nurse and had purchased a truck through my credit union and at the time of purchase I also purchased a protection policy, so that if I ever became injured or too sick to work that my purchased policy would cover my payments until I could return to work. I also explained that my credit union had merged with another credit union and during this transitional period the new credit union had dropped my policy without my knowledge and would not except payments from the insurance company where I had purchased the policy. I had been diagnosed with valley fever and it had disseminated through out my body and I could no longer work. Since this time and after finding out that the new credit union would not except payments from my policy holder I was running out of hope. Seth immediately knew what I had also thought.... that this can not be legal he asked me to allow him some time to see what could be done. I received a call in a couple of days later from Seths assistant telling me that they were going to take my case and asked me if I could come into sign paperwork. I figured this would probably cost a lot of money that in my situation I just didn’t have. When I arrived Seth told me that they were not going to charge me anything, and that they would recover all fees from the credit union if we won and if we lost he would only ask me to be responsible for the filing fees. I could not have asked to have a more ethical team on my side. I cried on my way home because you just don’t come across such good and ethical people these days. They were able to get my vehicle almost completely paid off and we never had to go to court. I would recommend him and his legal team to anyone looking for an awesome attorney To represent them.

Very disappointed. My wife fractured her ankle and quickly called this firm for assistance with my wife's case. Seth and the paralegal just gave us the run around for over a year. We finally received a letter in the mail telling us that they basically don't have time for her case anymore since they have bigger better cases to worry about, just ridiculous. I attached a picture of the letter for proof. The attorney that they refer us Kyle Jones got us a settlement quickly.  Turns out Seth and his paralegal send the demand letter to the wrong place! In addition, they never followed up with us, I was the one calling for updates. Just unprofessional and disappointing.

I chose this law office based on its strong online reviews and reputation for handling Social Security disability cases. Unfortunately, my experience did not reflect that standard of professionalism.

After receiving an SSI denial, I promptly sent the requested denial letter to the office as requested and was told someone would call me back to discuss next steps. All communication was routed through the same assigned representative. Despite multiple follow-up calls and text messages over the course of approximately 30 days, I did not receive a return call, confirmation, or clear communication.

This was especially concerning given the strict 60-day appeal deadline involved in Social Security cases. I made repeated efforts to follow up, was placed on hold multiple times, and was told messages would be passed along, but no response ever came.

I understand that law offices can be busy, but timely communication is critical in disability cases where deadlines directly affect a claimant’s rights and benefits. Due to the lack of follow-through and responsiveness, I was forced to seek representation elsewhere to protect my appeal deadline.

I hope this feedback helps the office improve communication with future clients, especially those navigating disability claims who are already under significant stress.

reviews.text:
Warning: My experience with this attorney was extremely poor. This is my third attempt to post this review after the first two were removed as “spam.” I have provided documentation confirming that I was a paying client. This review reflects my real experience.

I paid approximately $15,000 for representation in what should have been a straightforward divorce with no minor children. In return, I received very limited court appearances, poor communication, and decisions that left me financially exposed.

When opposing counsel presented information that resulted in an order against me, the matter was later reset for trial after issues came to light. However, no request for sanctions or corrective action was made on my behalf. As a result, I was forced to spend another significant amount of money retrying a case that, in my view, should not have required it. The financial impact was substantial.

Communication was one of the biggest failures. I called the office nine times, sent multiple emails, and even went in person to try to schedule a meeting. I received little to no response. Then, three days before a scheduled hearing, I received a text message demanding an additional $7,000 or she would withdraw. She ultimately withdrew the day before the hearing, leaving me without representation at a critical moment.

I filed a complaint with the State Bar. During that process, she acknowledged making a mistake. While no discipline was imposed, that does not change the financial consequences or stress I experienced.

Divorce is already one of the most difficult experiences a person can go through. In my experience, this representation added financial strain and unnecessary stress rather than protection or advocacy.

If you are considering hiring this attorney, I strongly encourage you to ask detailed questions about billing practices, communication expectations, and withdrawal policies before signing a contract.

Based on my experience, I would not recommend this attorney

If I could give this woman 0 star, I would.
She was supposed to represent me when I was around 11 years old (I am now 26 and just found her)… She didn’t listen to me what so ever, she took my “fathers” side over mine, because money talks…

Thanks for the trauma Paige👍 by the way this was the Wooton case…

I had the pleasure of meeting Paige, and I was truly impressed by her expertise, professionalism, and sincere dedication to her clients. She possesses an extraordinary talent for simplifying intricate legal issues into clear, digestible language, which instilled a sense of comfort and confidence during our discussions. Paige's enthusiasm for family law shines through in her attentive listening, thoughtful explanations of options, and unwavering commitment to her clients' best interests. Whether addressing prenuptial agreements, mediation, or sensitive matters like restraining orders, I felt completely at ease sharing my personal concerns with her. The exceptional service I received from Paige and her team, particularly from Kelly, one of her paralegals, was remarkable. From the moment I entered the office, Kelly fostered an environment filled with warmth, professionalism, and genuine care. She consistently went the extra mile to ensure that every interaction was smooth and stress-free, whether it involved scheduling meetings, providing updates, or simply offering a friendly smile and engaging conversation. Kelly served as a dependable point of contact and a soothing presence during what can often be a daunting legal journey. What truly distinguishes Paige is her meticulous attention to detail, empathy, and unwavering commitment to client comfort. She anticipated my needs before I even expressed them, ensuring I always felt informed and supported. It is evident that Paige takes immense pride in delivering exceptional client service, a quality that positively reflects on her entire firm.

Hiring Paige was the best decision I’ve ever made. I was facing false allegations and dealing with a hostile, abusive ex. From day one, Paige believed in me, took the time to understand the full story, and fought relentlessly in court to make sure the truth came out.

Not only did Paige help me obtain full custody of my daughter, but also secured a restraining order that gave us both the safety and peace we desperately needed. Paige and her teams knowledge of domestic violence law and custody issues was unmatched—they were calm, confident, and assertive in court.

Every call and email was returned quickly, and I always felt like a priority. If you're dealing with a toxic or dangerous situation and need someone who won’t back down, Paige is who I would recommend.

I will forever appreciate all they did. Thank you for giving me and my daughter a fresh start.

Paige Etcheverry and her team were absolutely phenomenal in representing my adult son during his custody case. They were incredibly diligent, well-prepared, and kept our family informed every step of the way. Paige made herself available whenever we needed, always with grace and professionalism. I’m deeply grateful for the outcome their hard work achieved. Custody cases can be emotionally exhausting, but Paige and her team helped make this journey as positive as possible.

reviews.text:
I would not recommend this lawyer to anyone who is looking for real support and aggressive representation. In the beginning, he presents himself as responsive and professional, but once he officially takes on your case, communication becomes minimal. He only reaches out when a court date is approaching, and even then, it’s last-minute and unhelpful.In court, he lacks assertiveness and rarely advocates strongly on your behalf. His usual tactic is simply asking the District Attorney for more time, which resulted in my case dragging on for over a year with no progress. He failed to take any meaningful steps to resolve or fight the case during that time.
To make matters worse, after doing little to nothing to help, he pushed for the case to go to trial — a move that conveniently allows him to charge another ten thousand dollars more in fees. It became clear that his priority was not justice or helping his client, but squeezing as much money out of the situation as possible.If you’re looking for a lawyer who genuinely cares and will fight for you, I strongly suggest looking elsewhere. Don’t waste your time or hard-earned money on someone who’s just going through the motions without real dedication.
reviews.ownerResponse: Im sorry you feel misrepresented, but I've checked my system and do not have any record of you as a client.  If you want to reach out and discuss further details, then please give me a call

reviews.text: Bo is AMAZING!!! He took care of everything from start to end. Him and his staff were always so accommodating. I highly recommend him!!

It’s taken me some time to write this review, not because I didn’t appreciate the help, but because I wanted my words to come from a real place, and that’s from my heart. Life hit me hard during my legal process. I was grieving my mother going through her terminal cancer and ultimately the loss of my mother, carrying the weight of being a father, a husband, and a veteran trying to hold it all together. Through all of that, Bo Koenig, his wife, and their entire team became more than just legal counsel, they became a source of strength.

From the first day, they treated me like family, not a case number. Their attentiveness, compassion, and guidance made all the difference in the world, and I’ll never forget that. I was never in the dark. I was always kept informed. And when it felt like everything was falling apart, they stood firm beside me.

As a Marine Corps veteran, it meant the world to see how much they care about those who’ve served. They understood the layers of pressure I was under, not just legally, but emotionally and mentally. When I was ultimately cleared, it felt like a full-circle moment. Not only did justice prevail, but I walked away having gained something more valuable: clarity, humility, and a renewed purpose.

If you’re reading this and you’re going through something, stop, take a breath, and talk to someone you trust. Don’t let one bad moment define your future. It’s not worth the stress, the shame, or the pain even in this setback there is a lesson, you just have to fight through it. I’ve chosen to become a beacon for others, to show that you can rise above life’s obstacles. You can be better than the person you used to be.

Bo, his wife, and their team didn’t just help me legally, they reminded me of who I am and the kind of man I want to continue to be. I will always be grateful for their dedication, and I recommend them with the highest level of respect and gratitude.

Case dismissed and expunged.
